name: portalgems-desktop
description: PortalGems desktop app (Electron shell over wormhole-core)
author: Gems-Tech <yenis92@live.com>

scripts.build:bundles: cross-env NODE_PATH=./node_modules esbuild src/main.ts src/preload.ts --bundle --platform=node --format=cjs --outdir=dist --external:electron && cross-env NODE_PATH=./node_modules esbuild src/renderer/index.tsx --bundle --alias:i18next=./node_modules/i18next --alias:react-i18next=./node_modules/react-i18next --outfile=dist/renderer.js
scripts.build: npm run build:bundles && npm run build:native
scripts.dev:watch: NODE_PATH=./node_modules esbuild src/main.ts src/preload.ts --bundle --platform=node --format=cjs --outdir=dist --external:electron --watch=forever & M=$!; NODE_PATH=./node_modules esbuild src/renderer/index.tsx --bundle --alias:i18next=./node_modules/i18next --alias:react-i18next=./node_modules/react-i18next --outfile=dist/renderer.js --watch=forever & R=$!; trap 'kill $M $R 2>/dev/null' EXIT INT TERM; wait
scripts.dev: unset ELECTRON_RUN_AS_NODE; npm run build:bundles && { NODE_PATH=./node_modules esbuild src/main.ts src/preload.ts --bundle --platform=node --format=cjs --outdir=dist --external:electron --watch=forever & M=$!; NODE_PATH=./node_modules esbuild src/renderer/index.tsx --bundle --alias:i18next=./node_modules/i18next --alias:react-i18next=./node_modules/react-i18next --outfile=dist/renderer.js --watch=forever & R=$!; trap 'kill $M $R 2>/dev/null' EXIT INT TERM; electron . --no-sandbox; }

linux.synopsis: Secure device-to-device file transfer over magic-wormhole
linux.description: PortalGems sends files directly between devices with a short one-time code - end-to-end encrypted, no accounts, no cloud.
